- `nums[l...p]` **严格** 递增，

- `nums[q...r]` **严格** 递增。

请你从数组 `nums` 的所有三段式子数组中找出和最大的那个，并返回其 **最大** 和。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,-2,-1,-3,0,2,-1]

**输出：**-4

**解释：**

选择 `l = 1`, `p = 2`, `q = 3`, `r = 5`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[1...2] = [-2, -1]` 严格递增 (`-2 < -1`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[2...3] = [-1, -3]` 严格递减 (`-1 > -3`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[3...5] = [-3, 0, 2]` 严格递增 (`-3 < 0 < 2`)。
- 和 = `(-2) + (-1) + (-3) + 0 + 2 = -4`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [1,4,2,7]

**输出:** 14

**解释:**

选择 `l = 0`, `p = 1`, `q = 2`, `r = 3`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[0...1] = [1, 4]` 严格递增 (`1 < 4`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[1...2] = [4, 2]` 严格递减 (`4 > 2`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[2...3] = [2, 7]` 严格递增 (`2 < 7`)。
- 和 = `1 + 4 + 2 + 7 = 14`。

 

**提示:**

- `4 <= n = nums.length <= 10e5`
- `-10e9 <= nums[i] <= 10e9`
- 保证至少存在一个三段式子数组。

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    MaxSum = lists:foldl(
        fun(L, Acc) ->
            lists:foldl(
                fun(R, InnerAcc) ->
                    case R - L + 1 >= 4 of
                        true ->
                            case find_p_q(Nums, L, R) of
                                {P, Q} ->
                                    SubArray = lists:sublist(Nums, L + 1, R - L + 1),
                                    Sum = lists:sum(SubArray),
                                    max(Sum, InnerAcc);
                                false ->
                                    InnerAcc
                            end;
                        false ->
                            InnerAcc
                    end
                end,
                Acc,
                lists:seq(L + 3, N - 1)
            )
        end,
        -1000000000000000000,
        lists:seq(0, N - 4)
    ),
    MaxSum.

find_p_q(Nums, L, R) ->
    case find_p(Nums, L, R) of
        false -> false;
        P ->
            case find_q(Nums, P, R) of
                false -> false;
                Q -> {P, Q}
            end
    end.

find_p(Nums, L, R) ->
    find_p(Nums, L + 1, R - 2, L + 1).
find_p(_Nums, P, _R, P) when P >= _R -> false;
find_p(Nums, P, R, Start) ->
    case is_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, Start + 1, P - Start + 1)) of
        true ->
            case P < R of
                true -> P;
                false -> false
            end;
        false ->
            find_p(Nums, P + 1, R, Start)
    end.

find_q(Nums, P, R) ->
    find_q(Nums, P + 1, R - 1, P + 1).
find_q(_Nums, Q, _R, Q) when Q >= _R -> false;
find_q(Nums, Q, R, Start) ->
    case is_decreasing(lists:sublist(Nums, Start + 1, Q - Start + 1)) of
        true ->
            case is_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, Q + 1, R - Q + 1)) of
                true -> Q;
                false -> find_q(Nums, Q + 1, R, Start)
            end;
        false ->
            find_q(Nums, Q + 1, R, Start)
    end.

is_increasing([H1, H2 | T]) ->
    case H1 < H2 of
        true -> is_increasing([H2 | T]);
        false -> false
    end;
is_increasing(_) -> true.

is_decreasing([H1, H2 | T]) ->
    case H1 > H2 of
        true -> is_decreasing([H2 | T]);
        false -> false
    end;
is_decreasing(_) -> true.
```

```erlang
process_subarrays(Nums, N, MaxSum) ->
```

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

**三段式子数组** 是一个连续子数组 `nums[l...r]`（满足 `0 <= l < r < n`），并且存在下标 `l < p < q < r`，使得：

- `nums[l...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...r]` **严格** 递增。

请你从数组 `nums` 的所有三段式子数组中找出和最大的那个，并返回其 **最大** 和。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,-2,-1,-3,0,2,-1]

**输出：**-4

**解释：**

选择 `l = 1`, `p = 2`, `q = 3`, `r = 5`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[1...2] = [-2, -1]` 严格递增 (`-2 < -1`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[2...3] = [-1, -3]` 严格递减 (`-1 > -3`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[3...5] = [-3, 0, 2]` 严格递增 (`-3 < 0 < 2`)。
- 和 = `(-2) + (-1) + (-3) + 0 + 2 = -4`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [1,4,2,7]

**输出:** 14

**解释:**

选择 `l = 0`, `p = 1`, `q = 2`, `r = 3`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[0...1] = [1, 4]` 严格递增 (`1 < 4`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[1...2] = [4, 2]` 严格递减 (`4 > 2`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[2...3] = [2, 7]` 严格递增 (`2 < 7`)。
- 和 = `1 + 4 + 2 + 7 = 14`。

 

**提示:**

- `4 <= n = nums.length <= 10e5`
- `-10e9 <= nums[i] <= 10e9`
- 保证至少存在一个三段式子数组。

-spec solve(list[int]) -> int.
solve(list[int]) ->, please generate code in Erlang.

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    MaxSum = find_max_sum(Nums, N, -1, 1, 2, 3, -1000000000000000000),
    MaxSum.

find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P, Q, R, CurrentMax) when R =< N ->
    case is_valid_subarray(Nums, L, P, Q, R) of
        true ->
            SubarraySum = lists:sum(lists:sublist(Nums, L + 1, R - L)),
            NewMax = max(CurrentMax, SubarraySum),
            find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P, Q, R + 1, NewMax);
        false ->
            find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P, Q, R + 1, CurrentMax)
    end;
find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P, Q, R, CurrentMax) when Q + 2 < N ->
    find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P, Q + 1, Q + 2, CurrentMax);
find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P, Q, R, CurrentMax) when P + 2 < N ->
    find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P + 1, P + 2, P + 3, CurrentMax);
find_max_sum(Nums, N, L, P, Q, R, CurrentMax) when L + 2 < N ->
    find_max_sum(Nums, N, L + 1, L + 2, L + 3, L + 4, CurrentMax);
find_max_sum(_, _, _, _, _, _, CurrentMax) ->
    CurrentMax.

is_valid_subarray(Nums, L, P, Q, R) ->
    case {L >= 0, P > L, Q > P, R > Q, R =< length(Nums)} of
        {true, true, true, true, true} ->
            Inc1 = is_strictly_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, L + 1, P - L)),
            Dec = is_strictly_decreasing(lists:sublist(Nums, P + 1, Q - P)),
            Inc2 = is_strictly_increasing(lists:sublist(Nums, Q + 1, R - Q)),
            Inc1 and Dec and Inc2;
        _ ->
            false
    end.

is_strictly_increasing([_]) -> true;
is_strictly_increasing([X, Y | Rest]) when X < Y -> is_strictly_increasing([Y | Rest]);
is_strictly_increasing(_) -> false.

is_strictly_decreasing([_]) -> true;
is_strictly_decreasing([X, Y | Rest]) when X > Y -> is_strictly_decreasing([Y | Rest]);
is_strictly_decreasing(_) -> false.
```

```erlang
solve(Nums) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    MaxSum = find_max_sum(Nums, N, -1000000000000000000),
    MaxSum.

find_max_sum(Nums, N, MaxSum) ->
    case N < 4 of
        true -> MaxSum;
        false ->
            {NewMaxSum, NewNums} = process_subarrays(Nums, N, MaxSum),
            find_max_sum(NewNums, N - 1, NewMaxSum)
    end.

process_subarrays(Nums, N, MaxSum) ->
    case N < 4 of
        true -> {MaxSum, Nums};
        false ->
            Subarray = lists:sublist(Nums, N),
            case check_subarray(Subarray) of
                {true, Sum} ->
                    NewMaxSum = max(MaxSum, Sum),
                    process_subarrays(Nums, N - 1, NewMaxSum);
                false ->
                    process_subarrays(Nums, N - 1, MaxSum)
            end
    end.

check_subarray(Subarray) ->
    Len = length(Subarray),
    case Len < 4 of
        true -> false;
        false ->
            check_all_possible(Subarray, Len, 1, Len - 2, false, -1000000000000000000)
    end.

check_all_possible(Subarray, Len, L, R, Found, MaxSum) ->
    if
        L >= R -> 
            case Found of
                true -> {true, MaxSum};
                false -> false
            end;
        true ->
            case check_partitions(Subarray, L, R) of
                {true, Sum} ->
                    NewMaxSum = max(MaxSum, Sum),
                    check_all_possible(Subarray, Len, L + 1, R, true, NewMaxSum);
                false ->
                    check_all_possible(Subarray, Len, L + 1, R, Found, MaxSum)
            end
    end.

check_partitions(Subarray, P, Q) ->
    case P >= Q orelse P < 1 orelse Q >= length(Subarray) of
        true -> false;
        false ->
            case is_increasing(lists:sublist(Subarray, 1, P + 1)) andalso
                 is_decreasing(lists:sublist(Subarray, P + 1, Q - P + 1)) andalso
                 is_increasing(lists:sublist(Subarray, Q + 1, length(Subarray) - Q)) of
                true ->
                    Sum = lists:sum(Subarray),
                    {true, Sum};
                false ->
                    false
            end
    end.

is_increasing([H|T]) ->
    is_increasing(T, H).

is_increasing([], _) -> true;
is_increasing([H|T], Prev) ->
    if
        H > Prev -> is_increasing(T, H);
        true -> false
    end.

is_decreasing([H|T]) ->
    is_decreasing(T, H).

is_decreasing([], _) -> true;
is_decreasing([H|T], Prev) ->
    if
        H < Prev -> is_decreasing(T, H);
        true -> false
    end.
```
